1-expert.raw_response:
## ELSA-FN Febrile Neutropenia Union — FHIR Queries

**Pediatric cutoff anchor:** Current date is 2026-06-17 → patients born after **2008-06-17** are < 18 years old.

---

### Query 1 — Condition: Neutropenia (ICD-10-CM D70.x)
Covers all neutropenia subtypes: congenital, chemotherapy-induced, drug-induced, infectious, cyclic, and unspecified.

```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|D70.0,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|D70.1,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|D70.2,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|D70.3,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|D70.4,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|D70.8,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|D70.9&patient.birthdate=gt2008-06-17
```

---

### Query 2 — Condition: Fever (ICD-10-CM R50.x)
Covers unspecified fever, fever with chills, and fever presenting with a comorbid condition (e.g., coded alongside D70.x for febrile neutropenia).

```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|R50.0,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|R50.81,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|R50.9&patient.birthdate=gt2008-06-17
```

---

### Query 3 — Observation: Absolute Neutrophil Count (ANC) below severe neutropenia threshold
LOINC 751-8 (automated CBC) and 26499-4 (general ANC); threshold < 0.5 × 10³/µL (= 500 cells/µL), the IDSA/ASCO severe neutropenia cutoff.

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|751-8,http://loinc.org|26499-4&value-quantity=lt0.5|http://unitsofmeasure.org|10*3/uL&status=final,amended,corrected&patient.birthdate=gt2008-06-17
```

---

### Query 4 — Observation: Body Temperature above ELSA-FN fever threshold
LOINC 8310-5 (any site) and 8331-1 (oral); threshold ≥ 38.3 °C per IDSA febrile neutropenia guidelines (single temperature criterion).

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|8310-5,http://loinc.org|8331-1&value-quantity=ge38.3|http://unitsofmeasure.org|Cel&status=final,amended,corrected&patient.birthdate=gt2008-06-17
```

---

### Query 5 — MedicationRequest: Cefepime (RxNorm 20489)
Standard first-line empiric IV anti-pseudomonal cephalosporin for febrile neutropenia; cross-indicated for gram-negative bacteremia and hospital-acquired/ventilator-associated pneumonia.

```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|20489&status=active,completed&patient.birthdate=gt2008-06-17
```

---

### Union Logic Summary

| Query | Resource | Code System | Signal |
|-------|----------|-------------|--------|
| 1 | `Condition` | ICD-10-CM D70.0–D70.9 | Coded neutropenia diagnosis |
| 2 | `Condition` | ICD-10-CM R50.0, R50.81, R50.9 | Coded fever diagnosis |
| 3 | `Observation` | LOINC 751-8, 26499-4 | ANC < 0.5 × 10³/µL (lab-confirmed) |
| 4 | `Observation` | LOINC 8310-5, 8331-1 | Temp ≥ 38.3 °C (vitals-confirmed) |
| 5 | `MedicationRequest` | RxNorm 20489 | Cefepime order (treatment proxy) |

> **Post-processing:** Extract `subject.reference` (Patient ID) from each result bundle, then compute the **set union** across all five query result sets. Patients appearing in **any** query are flagged as potential febrile neutropenia cases. Patients appearing in **both** a neutropenia signal (Q1 or Q3) **and** a fever signal (Q2 or Q4) are high-confidence algorithm-confirmed cases.

1-expert.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries — ELSA-FN Severe Neutropenia Laboratory Criterion (ANC < 500 cells/µL)

**LOINC 751-8** — *Neutrophils [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count* — is the precise code for this criterion. Because clinical laboratories report ANC in multiple UCUM unit representations of the same quantity, three parallel queries are required to ensure no cases are missed:

```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|751-8&value-quantity=lt500||/uL

Observation?code=http://loinc.org|751-8&value-quantity=lt0.5||10*3/uL

Observation?code=http://loinc.org|751-8&value-quantity=lt0.5||10*9/L
```

---

### Query Logic Breakdown

| Query | LOINC Code | Description | Threshold | UCUM Unit | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `751-8` | ANC by automated count | `lt500` | `/uL` | Cells per microliter (direct count) |
| 2 | `751-8` | ANC by automated count | `lt0.5` | `10*3/uL` | Thousands per microliter (×10³/µL) |
| 3 | `751-8` | ANC by automated count | `lt0.5` | `10*9/L` | SI units (×10⁹/L); numerically identical to ×10³/µL |

### Key Design Notes

- **LOINC 751-8** is the authoritative code for **automated** differential ANC — distinct from manual counts (`753-4`) or calculated ANC (`26499-4`); the ELSA-FN algorithm specifies the automated-count path
- **Severe neutropenia threshold** in the algorithm is ANC < 500 cells/µL; the three numeric values (`500`, `0.5`, `0.5`) are equivalent — unit-aware FHIR servers may normalize these, but unit-unaware servers require all three forms
- **`/uL`** is the most common reporting unit in North American LIS/EHR systems; **`10*3/uL`** is common in European systems; **`10*9/L`** is the formal SI representation
- Consider appending `&status=final,amended,corrected` to restrict to verified results and `&_include=Observation:subject` to retrieve linked Patient resources for downstream febrile neutropenia cohort construction

### ⚠️ Critical Caveats for ELSA-FN Protocol Cohort Building

This query returns **all cefepime prescriptions**, not a febrile neutropenia–specific cohort. As flagged in your request, cefepime is heavily cross-indicated. Consider layering these additional filters post-query or via chained searches:

#### 1. **Confirm Febrile Neutropenia Context**
Cross-reference with `Condition` resources for FN-related diagnoses:

#### 2. **Confirm IV Route (not oral/IM)**

*(SNOMED `47625008` = Intravenous route)*

#### 3. **Confirm Inpatient/Hospital Setting**
```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|20481&category=inpatient
```

#### 4. **Link to Neutropenia Labs (ANC)**
Combine with low ANC observations to strengthen FN specificity:
```
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|751-8&value-quantity=lt500|http://unitsofmeasure.org|/uL
```
*(LOINC `751-8` = Neutrophils [#/volume] in Blood)*

### Recommended Multi-Step Cohort Strategy

```
# Step 1: All cefepime prescriptions (broad net)
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|20481&_include=MedicationRequest:subject

# Step 2: Restrict to patients with FN diagnosis
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|D70.9&_revinclude=MedicationRequest:subject

# Step 3: Corroborate with ANC <500
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|751-8&value-quantity=lt500|http://unitsofmeasure.org|/uL
```
